---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
Tip: lead with the problem you're trying to solve, not the solution
shape. The best issues describe a real situation where PanicMode
falls short, then ask "is the right answer here X, or something else?"

The Roadmap section of README.md has work that's already been
triaged. If your idea matches one of those, comment there instead
of opening a duplicate.
-->

## Problem

<!--
What goes wrong today? What scenario isn't handled, or is handled
in a way that's confusing / dangerous / slow?
-->

## Proposed direction

<!--
Optional. If you have a shape for the fix in mind, sketch it.
Otherwise leave this as "open to suggestions".
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
What else could solve the same problem? (e.g. "use Wazuh instead",
"write a custom_metrics script", "wait for SIGHUP hot-reload to land")
What makes those not fit?
-->

## Scope

<!--
- Is this a small tweak, or does it touch the architecture (new
  daemon thread, new dependency, new attack surface)?
- Does it require breaking config changes?
- Does it need new docs / examples?
-->

## Anything else

<!-- Links to similar features in other tools, prior art, related issues. -->
